question: Will CPI rise more than 1.0% in March 2026?
reasoning: The March 2026 CPI data has already been released on April 10, 2026 at 8:30 AM ET, showing that CPI increased only 0.3% for the month. This is far below the 1.0% threshold required for the market to resolve YES. Multiple sources confirm this official data from the Bureau of Labor Statistics. The market should resolve NO with 100% certainty given the official data is now public.
key_factors: Official BLS data shows March 2026 CPI increased 0.3%
risks: None - official data has been released and confirmed
